meta.title: The Ledger
meta.subtitle: One Piece 5e Campaign Wiki
meta.description: Character and location notes for the campaign.

sessions.summary: Boat called Wishing Star built. Met the klabautermann and got advantage on all rolls performed on the boat.
Started sailing. Captain blown up at the end.

Fought a giant with ancient giant lineage, obliterated his ship. Our captain was revealed to be a literal devil. Sky island shot through by Chompe/Shura using a stored attack from a giant. Fleet Admiral Umiryu meets the crew, teleported to the Red Port by the Red Line.
Questioned in front of the Fleet Admiral Umiryu. Pissed him off. Gulliver Glaurt flirts with Belladonna Xochi-Yiban and gets her number.
Spider zoan Ornigol. Chaotic. Gulliver Glaurt became Seaman Apprentice.
Off to rescue the king, kept hostage on an island. Planned the escape.
Fighting in the Blue Hole.
Not attended.

In the fish still. Crew found Nueheimer Warlow's snail to talk to Shibvh while talking with the leader of the fish terrorists. Glaurt talks his way through it. Blocked the gun with Glaurt's seaking meat. Escaped and levelled up to 5. Orion used Vohkt as bait and lost him.
Town burning/smouldering due to Ornigol. Shura talked too much to Callum (explosion kid) so Orion and Glaurt grabbed him. Orion and Glaurt hunting for town supplies.
Made it to the island, Hangward Isles. Mission wasn't binned. Lots of dead/injured people. Found the medic character. Glaurt to sneak to the pirates and disguise with Ventorez and Hazard.

Glaurt met Gol D. Roger while infiltrating. Found out about Deus leading the invasion. Glaurt joined Roger Pirates for a Davy Back fight. Won the Berry-Berry fruit and 100mil berry, gave 40mil to Roger. A prisoner, Cake-Man, escaped from jail after Orion gave him a cake. Shivbh oneshot the Captain (Cook).
Stopped a giant cannon. Light guy wanted to be a Warlord. Beetlejuice is missing. Shura apprehends Deus.
Bumped into Gol D. Roger getting incroyapples.
Went to court, Quintessa got Velda off. Going to Sabaody for patrolling on our ship.
Stayed at Marineford. Met Mercury and was mildly interrogated. Went to the Red Desert.
Quintessa built a car. Drove to a tree in the crater of the Red Desert. Bumped into a bunch of God's Knights. Glaurt ate the Mudskipper fruit. They spawned a fruit and Quintessa ate it.
Fruit training.
On our way to Sabaody. Got a call from a freak (Minobiko's ex-bf). Fleet Admiral promised Quintessa the spaceship Vohkt came in on if we solve Tack's mystery.
Sailing to a training island. Have to pass through the Calm Belt and Ancremoore's territory.

devilFruits.description: Fruit names from the campaign notes.

entities.name: Gulliver Glaurt
entities.description: Half-fishman half-giant. Boxer background. Bit of a casanova, Johnny Bravo/Might Guy/All Might inspirations. Injured as a boxer, went into medical debt in the Island Kingdom of Prodence, joined the Marines to pay it back.

facts.Inner Thoughts: I've done it before, I can do it again. Why not? Johnny Bravo voice: Whoah mama

notes: Kill count: 2 fodder on Ornigol's ship, 1 fishman on boat, 1 fishman in water.

entities.name: Shimazu Shura
entities.description: Session zero: beaten up for 45 minutes by Ornigol. Met Woodes on Cape Share after spending a month unconscious in his shed.

facts.Color Motif: Brown or black main colors with more colorful accents of red, blue or purple
facts.Inner Thoughts: Get up, keep going, never stop, for them, not just me
facts.Typical Hours Slept: 7 hours, 1 hour of just laying around in bed
facts.Alcohol Tolerance: Medium leaning on the lighter side

entities.name: Celestia Orion
entities.description: Ex-slave to Tambora. Big guy, has a bow with a 'z' marking. Called 'most boring marine' by Cozy.

entities.name: Shivbh
entities.description: Fishwoman Cyborg. Plans to multiclass into zealot. Possesses 3 of the six powers.

facts.Inner Thoughts: Stay indifferent, terrify, prove your worth, what if I'm wrong, testify my identity, I have no identity, follow orders
facts.How Often They Bathe: Twice daily, very intent about keeping hair clean

entities.name: Pentago Quintessa
entities.description:
Tiny alcoholic. 
5'2" per Anthony, 5'1" per V.

facts.Inner Thoughts: Proving myself, perfecting my crafts, justice
facts.Typical Hours Slept: The bare minimum (burning the candle at both ends)
facts.Do They Crunch Ice: No, but they do like rubbing it on their scars
facts.Ideal Devil Fruit: All devil fruits are evil in her eyes (but she might eat one anyways)
facts.Alcohol Tolerance: Frequent partaker, likes to drink while working

entities.name: Doflamingo Drake

facts.Inner Thoughts: To be the best in the room at any given time, try to do as many new things before his time ends, trying to remember what happened before
facts.How Often They Bathe: Twice a day (once he wakes up and before he goes to bed) if available
facts.Ideal Devil Fruit: No but if one came across his path that would help his dream he would take it

entities.name: Thomas Down
entities.description: Entry is struck through in the campaign notes.

facts.Specific Smell: Smells of Pop Rocks and Sea Water
facts.Inner Thoughts: Girls, Joy, Fun, Adventure, Friendship, God of the Earth, God of the Sun, God of the Rain, God of the Forest, Moon, Red Heads, Blondes, Brunettes, find mother

facts.Ideal Devil Fruit: The Goro Goro Fruit or the Dog Dog: Model Wide Mouth Dog fruit

entities.name: Shreya Yona
entities.description: Former bounty hunter turned pirate with the help of Vaka D. Ornigol.

entities.name: Yousuke Mi'sen
entities.description:
Yosuke Mi'sen is the scholar of the Merry More Pirates and the eighth member of the crew, joining in the South Blue but denying his place in the crew for several weeks on end until finally caving after the integration of Trench Leon. 

An only child that was raised within the Ryugu Kingdom of Fishman Island to a pair of neglectful and abusive extremist parents, Mi'sen's world was comprised of his books and the constant noise that accompanied his parents preachings of Blauvelt Ancremoor. Growing numb to most forms of physical pain, Mi'sen ventured out to change history revolving around fishmen, especially Blauvelt Ancremoor for the better of the next generation until being captured by Vasily Vintorez and sent aboard a prison vessel on a path towards Impel Down, saved by a freak accident involving Bilge. 

He first gained a bounty of 80,000,000 belly following his escape from the prison vessel and the following raid on the SB05 naval base. It later increased to 90,000,000 belly after a string of events following their misadventures in the Oronorma Kingdom, the island nation of Bellicoze Key and the tourist town of Dusk Teneral.

entities.name: Lionel Scudamoore
entities.description: Clean-freak. Former marine.

facts.Specific Smell: Mint (to keep the bugs and pest away)
facts.Favorite Food: Strip Steak with Russet potatoes and green beans
facts.Inner Thoughts: Avenge Them All, Redeem Them All, Save Them All
facts.How Often They Bathe: Every day, shampoo every other day to keep his hair healthy
facts.Ideal Devil Fruit: Legend speaks of a Doctor who could save lives with miracle operations with the use of the Ope Ope
facts.Alcohol Tolerance: High (drinks a lot of water when doing so)

entities.name: Fawkes Keel
entities.description:
Fawkes Keel is the captain of the Merry More Pirates and the current user of the More More Fruit, establishing his crew after several weeks of operation in the South Blue. 

The only child between Fawkes-Vaka D. Calypso and Fawkes-Vaka Halyard and the heir to the position of chieftain of Brandy Atoll, Keel was born in the Zewao region of Brandy Atoll and was heavily influenced by former comrade of his mother Calypso and uncle Vaka D. Ornigol, Chapman Stede. Inheriting the dream to unlock the Heart of the Sea after gaining a special key from Stede and a hand-me-down tricorn that initally belonged to Allsgrave Tack following the invasion from the Tambora Talismen. With a hunger for battle and copious amounts of food, he plans on taking down Lowe Tambora and his crew with his own and someday hopes to conquer the sea with his many conquests! 

He first gained a bounty of 55,000,000 belly following the raid on the SB05 naval base. It later increased to 100,500,000 belly after a string of events following their misadventures in the Oronorma Kingdom, the island nation of Bellicoze Key and the tourist town of Dusk Teneral.

entities.name: Musashi Yato
entities.description: From Wano. No feats.

entities.name: Battista Vivaldi
entities.description: Fishwoman, Musician.

facts.Specific Smell: Sea salt / sandalwood and orchid perfume
facts.Favorite Food: Crab Rangoons / Pineapple Upside Down Cake
facts.Inner Thoughts: Music, show em up, it's showtime~, watch this, be the craftiest, freedom, adventure, friendship, community, money, win, be the best
facts.Ideal Devil Fruit: Nui Nui no Mi (a hood classic)

entities.name: Allsgrave Tack
entities.description:
Allsgrave Tack is the captain of the Wishaul Pirates and a former user of the More More Fruit, establishing his crew in the West Blue. 

Formerly a businessman running the Allsgrave Barques & Bite, leaving his home of Golhord Providence to become a pirate after being inspired by local pirates that would stop by his shipbuilding and catering company, especially a captain by the name of Black Bell. Leaving his wife, Marianne and his son Wylliam, he built the Friday Departure and eventually shipwrecked on a small island, finding the More More Fruit. For several decades he sailed with his growing crew as an rookie in his 40s. Gaining infamy, rivals and more, he'd end up taking many young apprentices, begrudgingly at first, that would lead to some important names in Chapman Stede, Vaka Calypso and Vaka Ornigol. 

As a pirate, Tack was known for his outlandish and maddening tactics and actions across the world, defacing countless powers of their prestige. Despite his old age, his career lasted a surprisingly long while, taking on countless apprentices and triumphing over hundreds of pirate crews and Marine units. His infamy echoes across the world, as his battles shifted the landscape of several islands across the Grand Line, and his greatest achievement potentially being the Olstomb Crater outside of the Holy City of Mariejois. Fighting foes that had the advantage in age and power, his uncanny ability to improvise and keep his attitude up allowed the determined geezer to gain popularity amongst rookie pirates in his reign known as the “Reign of Fools”. Tack’s impressive power would later inspire the implementation of the Seven Warlords of the Sea from the Marines during his era. 

With a slowly growing bounty over the many decades and battles he fought with other Emperors of the Sea such as Grant Richter, Rakam Dhow and Wallo Sojourner, and powerful Marines such as Admiral Umiryu. At the end of his career, Allsgrave Tack's bounty ended up at an immense  5,464,900,000 belly that was only recently cancelled with the confirmation of his passing by Lowe Tambora.
notes: Allsgrave Tack was based on Paulsgrave Williams and John Silver, Tack has more bastard children spread across the world than there are members of both parties combined and doubled

entities.name: Blauvelt Ancremoore
entities.description:
V's #2 favourite emperor. Namesake based on a pirate, Abraham Blauvelt. "Ancremoor only gets refreshers or blonde shaken espressos." - V

Animal Resemblance: "Ancremoor is a whale." - V

entities.name: Lowe Tambora
entities.description: Killed Tack. Likely replaced Tack as Warlord. V's #1 favourite emperor. Namesake based on a pirate and a volcano, Edward Low and Mount Tambora.

entities.name: Pavise Sawkins
entities.description:
V's #5 favourite emperor. Namesake based on a type of shield. "Sawkins absolutely gets a Grande Pike Place with a single ice cube in it. Decaf by the way." - V

Very perceptive due to almost dying to Dohebi.

Animal Resemblance: "Sawkins would probably resemble a German Shepherd or any herding dogs." - V

entities.name: Corbett Joan
entities.description:
Corbett Joan is the captain of the Stray Pirates and the current user of the Griffin Griffin Fruit, establishing her crew in the South Blue. 

Although her history isn't known very well by the world at large, it is known that she is from the South Blue and had gotten into a conflict with a group of unknown pirates on the island of Baterilla, eventually leaving her stranded on an unmarked island alongside the captain of that crew. For months she and this captain fought over resources until she came across her Devil Fruit on that island and, although the sources tend to conflict, consumed the man due to the carnivorous nature of her power. Later on, with the assistance of her current first mate, known as "The Whistle" Oakley Bell, they formed the Stray Pirates as a pair of young women. To this day, the amount of battles fought by the Stray Pirates are some of the highest out of any crew in the modern era. As a pirate, Joan is known for her extremely aggressive nature, but more terrifying is her patience and willingness to strike like a true killer, using psychological warfare more effectively than most professionally trained torturers solely with her presence. Due to this fighting talent, most Marine interceptions are meant to stall for evacuation rather than a true battle. Joan's most well-known bout, aside from her frequent rampages throughout the West Blue, is against one of the world's most famous bounty hunters, formerly named Little Lily in a month long hunt that eventually led to Lily's untimely death. The youngest of the current Four Emperors, she is currently sporting an immense bounty of 4,098,000,000 belly that keeps her neck and neck with "Port Keep" Pavise Sawkins in terms of infamy.
notes: Corbett Joan was based on Jim Corbett and Joan of Arc, Joan hates zoos and aquariums to an absurd degree, the choice of the Griffon fruit is based on the Griffin featured in The Spiderwick Chronicles.

9ft5. "Kiritaka orders Signature Bunn Iced Coffee with Lavender cold foam. He always gets the Lavender cold foam to get a foam mustache." - V

Kiritaka has clashed with Ancremoor on several occasions.

entities.name: Irezumi
entities.description:
7ft3. "Cookie Mocha Frap with Extra Ice, Extra Whip, Extra Drizzle, Strawberry Inclusions and trenta sized. Every other day of the year, Dohebi gets water. And a single Spinach Feta Wrap. She always gives a 5 dollar tip. Good Marines tip." - V

Once almost killed Sawkins, but wasn't legally allowed. As a result, Sawkins is very perceptive.

entities.name: Aoshika
entities.description: 8ft4. User of the Port-Port fruit.

entities.name: Manmayer Meridian
entities.description: Blauvelt Ancremoor's adopted daughter. Has not been spoken to by her adopted father in 13 years. 5'8".

entities.name: Vice Admiral Tetsusake
entities.description: Voice claim: Robin Williams.

entities.name: Astein Velda
entities.description: Devil Fruit: Pump-Pump Fruit. Can motivate surrounding allies, "pumping" up their stats. She was originally born in the North Blue, on an island called Gallowstay Island. She had a father that was in the Marines, who later would become a pirate. She has a strict no kill rule and moral code. She was demoted several years prior from Lieutenant to Warrant Officer due to clashing with superior officers in physical confrontations during several missions, as well as for insubordination. She is not the highest ranking officer in her base, but is undoubtedly the strongest, due to being the only one to have been based in the Grand Line at a time. Her sword is a Flanking Company Officer's Sword from 1803. She frequently trains her body and mind, usually training with her blade.

entities.name: Choreboy Doppitori
entities.description: Wants to be an Admiral with a massive build and the Rock Rock fruit, wielding a large hammer. In reality they're a chubby 16 year old that hasn't trained yet.

entities.name: Jules Byrd
entities.description: "He's a bum." - Anthony

entities.name: Minobiko
entities.description: 11 feet tall

entities.name: Maynard Hazard
entities.description: Rope user. Son of Allsgrave Tack. Age 25.
notes: Daily routine: wake up early, eat, work out for two hours, hygiene, review rope knots and rigging, practice singing an old shanty while doing light cleaning, make sure things are triple secured for safety, read the world news and comic strips, call family for 30 minutes to an hour via transponder snail, try a new useless hobby, eat lunch (preferably burger or diner food), health check on injuries/scars, go to room and ruminate, lap around the vessel then practice swinging rope, triple check safety precautions a second time, work out for an hour, eat dinner, cold shower, sleep.

entities.name: Ferrule Kingdom
entities.description: "King Fauchard has gone missing while his husband, King Xyston, has gone to govern his army in foreign lands. It is your job as members of the Marines to track down, secure and defend the King until his husband returns from war. The Kingdom of Ferrule is a government affiliated island, so success is an utmost priority."
